summary: Iteration 133: Tested Vehicle Weight Edit, Print A5, and Manual WA/Group Send features. All backend APIs (16/16) and frontend features (12/12) working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test vehicle weight entry during backend testing (auto-cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit - updates editable fields (vehicle_no, party_name, farmer_name, product, tot_pkts, cash_paid, diesel_paid) 2) POST /api/vehicle-weight/send-manual - sends text+images to WA/Telegram (returns success even if not configured) 3) Edit dialog opens with all required fields and Save Changes updates the table 4) Print button triggers A5 print preview with 2 copies (Party Copy + Customer Copy with Driver/Authorized Signature) via iframe 5) Actions column shows all 6 icons: Edit(pencil), Print(printer), Download, WA, Group, Delete 6) Completed entries table shows all required columns: RST, Date, Vehicle, Party, Product, Pkts, 1st Wt, 2nd Wt, Net Wt, Cash, Diesel, Actions

backend_edit_api.details: PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit updates vehicle_no, party_name, farmer_name, product, tot_pkts, cash_paid, diesel_paid

backend_send_manual_images.details: POST /api/vehicle-weight/send-manual accepts base64 front_image and side_image

backend_branding.details: GET /api/branding returns company_name and tagline for print slip

backend_completed_entries_fields.details: Completed entries have all required fields: rst_no, date, vehicle_no, party_name, product, tot_pkts, first_wt, second_wt, net_wt, cash_paid, diesel_paid

frontend_actions_column_icons.details: Actions column shows 6 icons: Edit(pencil), Print(printer), Download, WA, Group, Delete

frontend_edit_dialog_fields.details: Edit dialog has all fields: Vehicle No, Product, Party Name, Farmer/Mandi, Packets, Cash Paid, Diesel Paid

frontend_edit_save_changes.details: Edit dialog Save Changes calls API and updates table (verified cash field update from 7777 to 9999)

frontend_print_button.details: Print button triggers print preview via iframe (safePrintHTML function)

frontend_completed_table_columns.details: Completed entries table shows all columns: RST, Date, Vehicle, Party, Product, Pkts, 1st Wt, 2nd Wt, Net Wt, Cash, Diesel, Actions

mocked_apis.camera_capture: Camera capture returns null/empty in test environment (no webcam in cloud)
mocked_apis.whatsapp_telegram_send: WhatsApp/Telegram actual send depends on user's API keys being configured - tested endpoint returns success with 0 sent counts
